CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:AppModels.kt$SavedRunResult.Companion$id.isEmpty() || name.isEmpty() || durationNanos == Long.MIN_VALUE || savedAtMillis == Long.MIN_VALUE || durationNanos <= 0L

ComplexCondition:MainActivity.kt$MainActivity$isClient && raceState.monitoringActive && hasPeers && localRole != SessionDeviceRole.UNASSIGNED && (!raceSessionController.hasFreshAnyClockLock() || raceState.anchorState == SessionAnchorState.LOST)

ComplexCondition:RaceSessionModels.kt$SessionLapResultMessage.Companion$senderDeviceName.isEmpty() || startedSensorNanos == Long.MIN_VALUE || stoppedSensorNanos == Long.MIN_VALUE || stoppedSensorNanos <= startedSensorNanos
ComplexCondition:RaceSessionModels.kt$SessionTriggerRefinementMessage.Companion$runId.isEmpty() || role == null || provisional == Long.MIN_VALUE || refined == Long.MIN_VALUE
